title: Clearwater Algaecide Algae Remover for Swimming Pool and Spa Hot Tub Water Treatment, Highly Effective Formula, 1 Litre
features: PREVENT ALGAE BUILD UP: on or below the surface of the water in your hot tub or swimming pool
REMOVE EXISTING ALGAE: from your pool/hot tub for clear, clean and healthy water
EASY TO USE: with clear instructions written on the bottle for dosage guidance (dosage quantity based on water volume)
DESIGNED FOR USE WITH: hot tubs, spas, paddling pools and larger above ground pools
HIGH QUALITY LIQUID ALGAECIDE: is safe to use in your water and is highly effective for long lasting, regular use
description: From the brand Previous page Discover the full range of Clearwater chemicals, which has all you need to effectively clean and maintain your pool or hot tub.
